wikipedia.title: Journal of Health and Social Behavior

stimulus: constant (1.0) vs signal-derived reserve predicting next-unit newcomer arrival, over clustered/iid/monotone newcomer schedules realized in two organs (text entities, music pitch-classes); generalization on real readings (esker, Metamorphosis short+full, Frère Jacques, Twinkle). Wikipedia titles fix the entity vocabulary.

closed-vocabulary tails: a stream that introduces its whole vocabulary early then only repeats (short nursery tunes; a fully-introduced cast). The long-run floor predicts a recurrence that does not come.

DRAWN, PENDING — the same constant in the text front-end is now threaded to the signal reserve under opts.signalReserve; the cold region is the surpriseAt KL channel (not just forwardDist): does signal-derived novelty change WHICH frame a REC restructures along, not only p(unseen)?
